{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Operator",
  "description": "Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Perfetti Van Melle group, one of the worlds largest manufacturers and distributors of confectionery and chewing gum, creating imaginative products and brands that are enjoyed in over 150 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Operator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

What You will Do


	Operate, monitor and troubleshoot production machinery in accordance with standard operating procedures (SOPs) and speed targets.
	Implement Autonomous Maintenance on machines at defined frequences.
	Accurately document all tasks performed, including machine operation and maintenance tasks.
	Collaborate with Maintenance Technicians to resolve machine related issues effectively.
	Apply all company provided personal protective equipment (PPE) and adhere to Health Safety regulations
	Prevent product cross-contamination by ensuring equipment cleanliness and hygiene standards.


Job Requirements


	Minimumof&nbsp; OND in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering field.
	At least three (3) years of relevant work experience as Mechanical or Electrical Technician
	Detailed orientation.
	Ability to work shift rotation &amp; extended work hours.
	High level of drive and initiative.
	Excellent ownership mindset.
	Good communication &amp; interpersonal relationship skills.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-24",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-25",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "Perfetti Van Melle"
    
  },

Technical Operator Job at Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Perfetti Van Melle Nigeria Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Perfetti Van Melle group, one of the worlds largest manufacturers and distributors of confectionery and chewing gum, creating imaginative products and brands that are enjoyed in over 150 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Operator

Job Location: Lagos

What You will Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Operate, monitor and troubleshoot production machinery in accordance with standard operating procedures (SOPs) and speed targets.
	Implement Autonomous Maintenance on machines at defined frequences.
	Accurately document all tasks performed, including machine operation and maintenance tasks.
	Collaborate with Maintenance Technicians to resolve machine related issues effectively.
	Apply all company provided personal protective equipment (PPE) and adhere to Health Safety regulations
	Prevent product cross-contamination by ensuring equipment cleanliness and hygiene standards.


Job Requirements


	Minimumof  OND in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering field.
	At least three (3) years of relevant work experience as Mechanical or Electrical Technician
	Detailed orientation.
	Ability to work shift rotation & extended work hours.
	High level of drive and initiative.
	Excellent ownership mindset.
	Good communication & interpersonal relationship skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Human Resources Generalist Job at Unikem Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Unikem Industries Limited is an indigenous manufacturing company in Nigeria.

As a result of its strategic market expansion, requires the services of dynamic, self-motivated and result-oriented candidate to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Generalist

Job Location: Ogun
Job Type: Full-Time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess a minimum educational qualification of B.Sc / HND or equivalent.
	Minimum 5 years relevant experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Operations Officer",
  "description": "FCSL Asset Management Company was incorporated in 1994 and has been operational for nearly 3 decades, providing various investments, financial services and advisory, with the Corporate Finance and Advisory, Equities and Fixed Income Securities and Markets

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;IT Operations Officer

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;

Duties and Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Maintain and enhance databases and reporting structures to support financial and operational decision-making
	Monitor platform performance and log metrics for decision support
	Provide end-to-end user and platform support for internal systems
	Maintain access control logs, support regular system audits, and participate in DR/backup reviews.
	Coordinate version control and patch management for key systems
	Prepare periodic performance reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly) covering KPIs, risk metrics, financial summaries, and departmental scorecards
	Ensure the accuracy, consistency, and completeness of data across systems through regular audits and validation processes
	Recommend improvements to reporting processes, data flow, and system usage to increase efficiency and reduce manual intervention
	Work closely with relevant units to maintain data integrity and accuracy and with finance team to ensure alignment of data inputs and outputs
	Support, upgrade, and troubleshooting of software, productivity tools or ERP systems relevant to finance operations
	Maintain strict confidentiality and security of sensitive financial and personnel data.


Requirements
Educational &amp; Professional Qualification:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or a related field
	CompTIA A+
	Microsoft 365 Certified: Modern Desktop Administrator Associate
	ITIL Foundation (Optional but advantageous)
	Familiarity with financial systems, ERP software, or data analysis tools.


Experience:


	2&ndash;4 years of relevant experience in IT Operations, data analysis, or reporting roles, preferably within a financial services, banking, or investment environment


Competency Requirements:


	Working knowledge of Order Management System/Asset Management System in a support or operations context
	Experience with automation tools like Power Automate, PowerShell scripting, or SQL triggers
	Competence in Windows environments, domain provisioning, and endpoint troubleshooting
	Strong documentation and support ticket management skills
	Ability to interpret complex data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights
	Excellent communication, team collaboration, and proactive problem-solving attitude
	High level of accuracy in handling and reporting data
	Strong knowledge of MS Excel (including pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas), SQL, and data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
	Ability to meet deadlines and handle multiple reporting cycles
	Demonstrates professionalism and discretion in handling sensitive financial and employee data
	Basic understanding of financial regulations and reporting requirements.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should&nbsp;send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@fcslng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-24",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "FCSL Asset Management Company"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "196343"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



IT Operations Officer Job at FCSL Asset Management Company




        
    

        
        FCSL Asset Management Company was incorporated in 1994 and has been operational for nearly 3 decades, providing various investments, financial services and advisory, with the Corporate Finance and Advisory, Equities and Fixed Income Securities and Markets

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Operations Officer

Job Location: Lagos 

Duties and Responsibilities 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain and enhance databases and reporting structures to support financial and operational decision-making
	Monitor platform performance and log metrics for decision support
	Provide end-to-end user and platform support for internal systems
	Maintain access control logs, support regular system audits, and participate in DR/backup reviews.
	Coordinate version control and patch management for key systems
	Prepare periodic performance reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly) covering KPIs, risk metrics, financial summaries, and departmental scorecards
	Ensure the accuracy, consistency, and completeness of data across systems through regular audits and validation processes
	Recommend improvements to reporting processes, data flow, and system usage to increase efficiency and reduce manual intervention
	Work closely with relevant units to maintain data integrity and accuracy and with finance team to ensure alignment of data inputs and outputs
	Support, upgrade, and troubleshooting of software, productivity tools or ERP systems relevant to finance operations
	Maintain strict confidentiality and security of sensitive financial and personnel data.


Requirements
Educational & Professional Qualification:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or a related field
	CompTIA A+
	Microsoft 365 Certified: Modern Desktop Administrator Associate
	ITIL Foundation (Optional but advantageous)
	Familiarity with financial systems, ERP software, or data analysis tools.


Experience:


	2–4 years of relevant experience in IT Operations, data analysis, or reporting roles, preferably within a financial services, banking, or investment environment


Competency Requirements:


	Working knowledge of Order Management System/Asset Management System in a support or operations context
	Experience with automation tools like Power Automate, PowerShell scripting, or SQL triggers
	Competence in Windows environments, domain provisioning, and endpoint troubleshooting
	Strong documentation and support ticket management skills
	Ability to interpret complex data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights
	Excellent communication, team collaboration, and proactive problem-solving attitude
	High level of accuracy in handling and reporting data
	Strong knowledge of MS Excel (including pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas), SQL, and data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
	Ability to meet deadlines and handle multiple reporting cycles
	Demonstrates professionalism and discretion in handling sensitive financial and employee data
	Basic understanding of financial regulations and reporting requirements. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
